name: @heartit/webm-player
description: Native WebM broadcast player for React Native — VP9 video + Opus audio with A/V sync

scripts.clean: del-cli android/build example/android/build example/android/app/build example/ios/build lib
scripts.test:asan: cmake -B tests/sanitizer/build-asan -S tests/sanitizer -DSANITIZER=address && cmake --build tests/sanitizer/build-asan && tests/sanitizer/build-asan/test_lsan
scripts.test:tsan: cmake -B tests/sanitizer/build-tsan -S tests/sanitizer -DSANITIZER=thread && cmake --build tests/sanitizer/build-tsan && tests/sanitizer/build-tsan/test_tsan
scripts.test:ubsan: cmake -B tests/sanitizer/build-ubsan -S tests/sanitizer -DSANITIZER=undefined && cmake --build tests/sanitizer/build-ubsan && tests/sanitizer/build-ubsan/test_ubsan
scripts.test:fuzz: cmake -B tests/sanitizer/build-fuzz -S tests/sanitizer -DSANITIZER=address && cmake --build tests/sanitizer/build-fuzz --target fuzz_demuxer && tests/sanitizer/build-fuzz/fuzz_demuxer
scripts.test:e2e: cmake -B tests/sanitizer/build-asan -S tests/sanitizer -DSANITIZER=address && cmake --build tests/sanitizer/build-asan --target test_e2e_demux && tests/sanitizer/build-asan/test_e2e_demux
scripts.test:temporal: cmake -B tests/sanitizer/build-asan -S tests/sanitizer -DSANITIZER=address && cmake --build tests/sanitizer/build-asan --target test_temporal_stress && tests/sanitizer/build-asan/test_temporal_stress

author: Heartit Inc
